privileged_info_summary: The task requires analyzing the true PDB entry 1VRT for HIV-1 Reverse Transcriptase. The NVP ligand correctly matches nevirapine. Analysis of the downloaded 1VRT.pdb verifies that the catalytic triad consists of ASP residues 110, 185, and 186. The distance between the NVP ligand and the triad is physically plausible between 8.0 and 15.0 Angstroms (closest ~8.13A, centroid ~13.49A). The listed known pocket residues surround the NVP binding pocket within roughly 7 Angstroms, matching established NNRTI pocket residues (including E138 from chain B).
